caption: Two people wearing dark clothing and bright orange life vests are working alongside a large, blue ship featuring the white number "44" on its hull. One person wears a baseball cap, while the other wears a dark beanie. In the initial moments, they are positioned near a white object, with the person in the beanie leaning forward. As the sequence progresses, they both grasp and lift a large, white, fabric-like bag or container from the ship's side. The person in the life vest has "U.S. COAST GUARD" printed in white letters on the back. They coordinate their movements to pull the object downward and away from the vessel. The background remains static, showing the blue hull of the ship and a yellow railing, while the focus remains on the physical effort of the two individuals moving the equipment.
